eyebrow: Hawke's Bay · Ages 5 & up · 25 years teaching
intro: Acres Wild Riding School offers riding lessons for children aged 5+, run by experienced horsewoman Janine Emerson, who's been teaching in Hawke's Bay for more than 25 years. The riding school has a team of wonderful ponies, great for absolute beginners, or riders wanting to learn to jump and develop their all-around horsemanship skills.
